productName: SMC - Infused Joint 1g - Banana Cream Pie - 1g
description: Ready-to-spark hybrid infused pre-roll of Banana Cream Pie, enhanced with concentrate for smoother, slower burning and a serious step up in strength. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — a creamy, sweet banana flavor, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
